data.title: Documentation and linting improvements completed
data.description:
## Summary

Successfully fixed all linting errors and completed missing documentation requirements.

## Changes Made

### Linting Fixes

* Removed 7 unused imports from test files
  * `pathlib.Path` removed from 6 test files
  * `tempfile` removed from `test_dashboard_build.py`
* Applied code formatting fixes to ensure consistency

### Documentation Additions

* [**CLAUDE.md**](<http://CLAUDE.md>): Added two new sections
  * Project Status: Describes the active migration/rebuild from beta to stable
  * Workflow: Documents all Makefile targets for development workflow
* **docs/installation.md**: Created comprehensive installation guide
  * Prerequisites (Go 1.21+, Make, Git)
  * Quick Installation instructions
  * Build process documentation
  * Installation options including `--build-only` flag
  * Output location and verification steps
  * Troubleshooting guide

### File Permissions

* Fixed permissions for `.claude/` configuration files (755 → 644)

## Validation Results

✅ **All checks passing:**

* Linting: 0 errors
* Validation: All configs valid
* Tests: 41/41 passing (100%)
* Build: Dashboard binary builds successfully

## Commit

Commit: 4821550
Branch: develop
